note: Performance-specific transformation evidence from sourced adjudication against Memory Alpha, keyed by canonical character (the transformation is a property of the character's on-screen realization). Each entry records what transformation was used, how extensive it was, whether the performer was visible as themselves, and the sources. The engine DERIVES eligible/ineligible/review from these facts; it never reads a verdict directly. Empty until the adjudication pass runs — until then every performance is honestly review.

<canonical character title>.transformation: e.g. full facial + cranial prosthetic | creature suit | mask | motion capture | voice-only | light nasal appliance | none
